LanguageData.Exotic_Monoshard.label: Monosteel
LanguageData.Exotic_Monoshard.description: Wickedly sharp and resilient monomolecular bullets.
LanguageData.Exotic_Monoshard2.label: MonoPlasteel
LanguageData.Exotic_Monoshard2.description: Wickedly sharp and resilient monomolecular bullets. This one is made out of plasteel.
LanguageData.Exotic_Monoshard3.label: MonoUranium
LanguageData.Exotic_Monoshard3.description: Wickedly sharp and resilient monomolecular bullets. This one features a heavy depleted uranium core.
LanguageData.Exotic_Buck.label: High Explosive Buckshot
LanguageData.Exotic_Buck.description: Large scattershot pellets tipped with a small explosive charge.
LanguageData.Exotic_Cluster.label: Cluster shot
LanguageData.Exotic_Cluster.description: You should test fire it inside your base and see what it does.
LanguageData.Exotic_Mayhem.label: Mayhem shot
